title: Code view layout bugs: undismissible Last run banner, misplaced scrollbar, wasted space on chat collapse

steps.description: Frontend: fix all three Code view layout bugs (dismissible Last run banner with localStorage persistence, move scroll container from #code-content-root to Architecture card, toggle --chat-width on chat collapse/expand, collapsed-rail CSS)
Code review: S01 (localStorage key scoping, definite-height scroll container, --chat-width restore on expand, no dynamic Tailwind classes, mobile drawer unchanged)
Tests: Jinja render reproduction tests (3) + Playwright browser smoke (3) covering banner dismissal persistence, scroll container relocation, --chat-width on collapse
Code review: S03 (tests fail on pre-S01 code, semantic assertions not shape-only, localStorage teardown, fixture reuse from test_chat_panel_smoke.py)
Final cross-agent review: template/JS/CSS-variable integration; AC coverage; no leaked changes to other pages; mobile unchanged
QV: Browser verification — verify all three Code view layout fixes end-to-end on the isolated E2E stack
